title: TTS barge-in detection — interrupt speech on new voice input
what_failed: TTS playback continued speaking even when the user started talking, causing overlap and bad UX.
fix_applied: agent/voice_loop.py: BargeinMonitor class. Runs silero-vad on a background thread during TTS playback. Sets interrupted=True when voice confidence > 0.5. VoiceLoop._speak() starts the monitor before TTS, stops it after, and logs if barge-in occurred. Graceful fallback if silero-vad unavailable.
